age.Description: age of the participant during first scan session

sex.Description: sex of the participant as reported by the participant

handedness.Description: handedness of the participant as reported by the participant

group.Description: experimental group the participant belonged to

Levels.Braille: participants underwent a Braille reading training course
Levels.Music: participants underwent a piano playing training course
Levels.Control: participants underwent no specific training and were blinded to the nature of the study

foreign_languages.Description: the number of foreign languages participant declared to know, apart from their native language
